content.problemStatement:
Complete the given function which doubles the value of variable **x** using pointer.


Input Format

The only line of input will contain a single integer xxx


Output Format

Output 2x2x2x.
content.inputFormat: The only line of input contains a single integer x (1 ≤ x ≤ 100).
content.outputFormat: Output a single integer, the value 2·x.

hidden.label: zero not allowed but test robustness

solution.approach: Read the integer x and compute 2*x. This is a direct O(1) operation with no extra data structures required.
